bench_setup.notes: USART1 loopback: PA9 (TX, AF push-pull) -> PA10 (RX, input floating). 8MHz HSI, BRR=0x457 (~115200 baud), 8N1. Sends {0x55,0xAA,0x12,0x34}. FAIL: error_code 0x1x=timeout byte x, 0x2x=mismatch byte x. Note: PA9/PA10 safe on generic F103 boards (no ST-Link bridge conflict).

peripheral_signals.notes: USART1 TX, AF push-pull. Wire: PA9 -> PA10.
USART1 RX, input floating. Wire: PA9 -> PA10.
